expectations.text: Agent invokes wiki-query at least once
expectations.evidence: Consultation log states: 'Skill: wiki-query — Invoked... Skill loaded its retrieval protocol prompt, but I did not proceed through its grep/read pipeline because the failure mode is unambiguous Compose semantics already encoded in the frontend-dev skill's standing rules.' The skill was loaded but no retrieval was performed.

expectations.text: Agent uses routing-table terms (not freeform query)
expectations.evidence: Used routing-table-aligned query: 'Compose LaunchedEffect key recomposition side effects one-shot screen entry'.

expectations.text: Answer cites or paraphrases wiki content (not generic)
expectations.evidence: Answer is synthesized from frontend-dev's standing rules and training knowledge. No wiki page is cited; consultation log confirms wiki retrieval was skipped.

expectations.text: Answer addresses the specific symptom in the prompt
expectations.evidence: Correctly diagnoses key-changing-on-recomposition; recommends LaunchedEffect(Unit) and the MVI-correct fix of loading in init/emitting an intent.
